identity.name: Hotel A2A Nexus
identity.visual_style: Deep Slate Backgrounds, Glowing Blue Accents, Glassmorphic Panels, Terminal-inspired Feeds

primary.description: Sky 400 - Main actions, active states, glowing accents

containers.card: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-xl shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-slate-900 hover:bg-primary/90 font-medium shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)] transition-all duration-200

inputs.default: bg-slate-950/50 border-border text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all

cards.agent_status: relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300

rules: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against slate backgrounds
Use explicit hover/focus states for all interactive elements
Avoid relying solely on color for status (use icons + text)
All images must have alt text
Interactive elements must have data-testid attributes

instructions_to_main_agent: OVERWRITE src/index.css with the new color variables (HSL values) to support opacity modifiers.
Implement the 'Agent Grid' with 8 cards as requested.
The 'Live Feed' should look like a terminal or chat log with monospace font.
Use Recharts for the analytics panel with the custom color palette.
Ensure the Sidebar is collapsible or compact on mobile.
Connect the WebSocket visual indicator (mocked if backend not ready) to the top right.
All functional elements must have data-testid attributes.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
